item.title: Deadly Texas bar shooting 'potentially act of terrorism', FBI says
item.description: Two people were killed and 14 injured, with the suspected gunman, identified by some media outlets, also shot dead.

item.title: Oil prices jump and shares fall as conflict escalates
item.description: Experts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher.

item.title: Watch: Video appears to show US F-15 fighter jet crashing in Kuwait
item.description: The US says six of its F-15 jets were "mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses", with all crew in a stable condition.

item.title: Michael B Jordan upends Oscars race as Sinners wins big at Actor Awards
item.description: The US star's best actor win for Sinners leaves the Oscars race too close to call.

item.title: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
item.description: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.
